base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of sonic — a character (playable) from 1991 sonic the hedgehog. Sonic — stand/tap-foot (impatient idle)/walk/run/super-run/spin-dash/spin-attack/jump/roll/hurt/drowning (countdown 5-0)/invincibility-sparkle. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
